title: Age of Horror
description: You won't be playing minecraft again...
body:
# Do you want a challenge? Do you want to be scared? Then this is the modpack for you!

## Features:
- Realistic features, torches need to be lit, etc
- New mobs and sounds to make sure you don't want to play Minecraft again...
- New terrifying biomes combined with Tectonic and Terralith to make sure your expirence is the best possible
- Blood particles
- Optimization mods to make sure you have the smoothest experience possible
- First person model and not enough animations to make your game more immersive
- And even more features!
### Mods
